calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Francisco Torres, Esq. for the Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Casandra Coats was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Craig Sullivan.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 66 Dedman Ct. , San Francisco, CA. 94124
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Past due rent and hold over damages $8654.20
Costs $335, for a total of $8989.20
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
